title: malouetia sessilis
intro: Malouetia sessilis is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa, commonly known as the "sensitive plant" due to its sensitive and fragile nature. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Malouetia sessilis, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism, while also promoting wound healing and skin regeneration.
